title: Employee Referral Program and Bonus Policy
text:
Q: What is the employee referral program and how does the bonus policy work?
A: Our employee referral program encourages current employees to refer qualified candidates for open positions within the company. When a referred candidate is hired and successfully completes their probationary period, the referring employee is eligible for a bonus. The bonus amount varies depending on the position filled and is paid out in the next payroll cycle after the new hire's probation is completed. To participate, employees must submit their referrals through the designated referral portal. It's a great way to help us find talent while also rewarding you for your efforts.
